person.name: Karthik Rao
person.title: Frontend Developer & UI/UX
person.tagline: I craft fast, accessible, pixel-perfect interfaces people love to use.

sections.headline: Interfaces that are fast, clean and accessible
sections.description: Frontend developer with a designer's eye. I turn Figma into responsive, accessible, high-performance React UIs — and I sweat the details.

sections.heading: About me
paragraphs: I'm a frontend developer who started in design, so I obsess over spacing, motion and accessibility as much as clean component code.
I build design systems, ship responsive UIs, and care a lot about performance and inclusive experiences.
credentials: Built and maintained a 40-component design system

items.title: Styling & Motion
items.desc: Tailwind, CSS, Framer Motion, design tokens.

items.title: Design
items.desc: Figma, design systems, prototyping, UX flows.

items.title: Design System
items.desc: Built a reusable component library in React + Storybook; adopted by 4 product teams.

items.title: Marketing Site Revamp
items.desc: Redesigned and rebuilt the landing site; +22% signups, 99 Lighthouse.

items.title: Accessible Checkout
items.desc: Reworked a checkout flow for full keyboard + screen-reader support.

sections.heading: Where I've worked
body: Frontend Developer, AgencyX (2023–present) — UI for client web apps and marketing sites.
UI Developer (intern → FT), StudioY (2022–2023) — design-to-code for a SaaS dashboard.

sections.heading: Let's make something beautiful
sections.subheading: Available for frontend & UI/UX roles and freelance.

sections.heading: Need a frontend dev with design sense?
sections.subheading: Let's talk — I'd love to see your project.
